title: Speaking: Greeting a Colleague
learningGoal: Perform a basic greeting and ask someone how they are doing.
instructions: You are meeting a new colleague from India for the first time. Greet them with 'Namaste' and ask how they are doing. Then, respond when they ask you the same question.
speakingPrompt: Respond to the audio prompts using the greetings you have learned.

subTasks.prompt: Amit replies 'Namaste'. Now ask him formally: 'How are you?'
Amit says 'Main theek hoon. Aap kaise hain?' (I am fine. How are you?). Reply: 'I am fine. Thank you.'

scenarioContext.targetText: आप अमित से मिल रहे हैं।
scenarioContext.transliteration: Aap Amit se mil rahe hain.

acceptableParaphrases: Saying just 'Main theek hoon' without 'Dhanyawad' is acceptable but less polite.

criteria.name: Pronunciation of Vowels
criteria.description: Clear pronunciation of 'aa' in Aap and 'ee' in theek.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: Namaste. Aap kaise hain? Main theek hoon. Dhanyawad.

feedbackRules.onPass: Great speaking! You had your first Hindi conversation.
feedbackRules.onFail: Don't forget the question structure: Aap (You) kaise (how) hain (are).
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort. Try to sound more confident and nasalize the 'n' in 'hain' and 'hoon'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: नमस्ते। आप कैसे हैं? मैं ठीक हूँ। धन्यवाद।

hintText: Speak slowly. Pronounce 'Aap' with a long 'a' sound (Aah-p).
commonMistakes: Saying 'Kaise aap hain' instead of 'Aap kaise hain'.
